prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约359→358→547→569→475名，波动较大；2023年大幅后移至547名，2024年继续后移至569名，2025年明显回升至475名（较2024年前移 94名），近两年呈先降后升走势；2025年基准约475名；该校在辽宁省物理类招生计划2021年22人、2022年21人、2023年21人、2024年20人、2025年14人、2026 年14人，2025年大幅缩招7人后2026年持平；2025年缩招是当年位次前移（竞争加剧）的重要推手，2026年计划持平则无额外扩缩影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工 程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第17名，稳居全国顶尖高校行列，综合实力和品牌认可度极高；2024年高考周期内该校因师德师风事件获明显负 面评价；2025年周期转为中性/混合；2026年周期评价偏负面，涉及师德师风、校园安全及考研压分等舆情；抖音热度总排名第44位（较热），报考关注度处于中上水平；第五轮学科评估中A+学科9个、A学科5个、A-学科1个；物理类招生专业涉及计算机科学与技术（A）、统计学（A+）、应用经济学（A+）、法学（A+）等，学科实力顶 尖，对高分理科考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类（A）2024年专业热度评估为推荐，电子信息/通信为高热推荐，电气工程及其自动化为高热推荐，统计学（A+） 为推荐；物理类考生2021年102737人→2025年143368人→2026年估算约143600人（按总考生200000人×物理类近年平均占比约71.8%），考生规模基本持平；省控线物理类本科批2025 年367分较2024年368分基本持平；中国人民大学位于北京，对辽宁考生属于跨省报考；北京作为一线城市对考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次因缩招大幅前移、2026年计划持平、声誉偏负面但学校层次顶尖、物理类招生专业（计算机、AI、统计 ）热度高、本省考生规模基本稳定等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年基准475名基础上小幅后移，预测最低位次约483名，区间428–538名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 359 → 358 → 547 → 569 → 475, with significant fluctuations; in 2023, it dropped sharply to 547, continued to drop to 569 in 2024, and rebounded noticeably to 475 in 2025 (moving up 94 places from 2024), showing a trend of first declining then rising in recent two years; the baseline for 2025 is about 475; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Liaoning was 22 in 2021, 21 in 2022, 21 in 2023, 20 in 2024, 14 in 2025, and 14 in 2026, with a significant reduction of 7 in 2025 and no change in 2026; the reduction in 2025 was a key driver for the ranking improvement (increased competition), while the unchanged plan in 2026 has no additional expansion or reduction effect.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 17th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, firmly among the top universities in the country, with extremely high comprehensive strength and brand recognition; during the 2024 college entrance examination cycle, the university received significantly negative evaluations due to teacher ethics incidents; in the 2025 cycle, it turned neutral/mixed; in the 2026 cycle, evaluations are somewhat negative, involving public opinion on teacher ethics, campus safety, and graduate exam score suppression; Douyin popularity ranks 44th overall (relatively hot), with application attention at an upper-middle level; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 9 A+ disciplines, 5 A disciplines, and 1 A- discipline; Physics Category enrollment majors include Computer Science and Technology (A), Statistics (A+), Applied Economics (A+), Law (A+), etc., with top-tier disciplinary strength, strongly attracting high-scoring science students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science (A) is rated as recommended in the 2024 major popularity assessment, Electronics/Communications as highly recommended, Electrical Engineering and Automation as highly recommended, and Statistics (A+) as recommended; the number of Physics Category examinees was 102,737 in 2021 → 143,368 in 2025 → estimated about 143,600 in 2026 (based on total examinees of 200,000 × recent average proportion of Physics Category about 71.8%), with the examinee scale basically stable; the provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch in 2025 is 367 points, basically unchanged from 368 points in 2024; Renmin University of China is located in Beijing, which is an inter-provincial application for Liaoning examinees; Beijing, as a first-tier city, has sustained appeal to examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant ranking improvement due to enrollment reduction in 2025, the unchanged plan in 2026, somewhat negative reputation but top-tier university level, high popularity of Physics Category enrollment majors (Computer Science, AI, Statistics), and basically stable local examinee scale, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly drop from the 2025 baseline of 475, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 483, and a range of 428–538.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 75 → 86 → 87 → 86 → 98, showing a slow overall backward trend, with a fluctuation range of about 12 positions in the last two years; the 2025 baseline is about 98, moving back 12 positions compared to 2024, the largest single-year decline in the past five years; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Liaoning Province was 24 in 2021, 23 in 2022, 20 in 2023, 20 in 2024, 27 in 2025, and 27 in 2026. After a significant expansion of 7 students in 2025, it remained unchanged in 2026, with the total plan at a recent high, which helps alleviate competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 17th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (17th in 2025, 18th in 2024), firmly among the top universities in the country, with extremely high comprehensive strength and brand recognition; during the 2024 college entrance examination cycle, the university received significantly negative evaluations due to a teacher ethics incident (professor dismissed for sexual harassment); the 2025 cycle turned neutral/mixed (with both negative events and positive signals from A++ discipline rankings); the 2026 cycle evaluation is somewhat negative, involving public opinion on teacher ethics, campus safety, and graduate exam score suppression; Douyin popularity ranks 44th overall (relatively popular), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level, indicating considerable application attention; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 9 A+ disciplines (Law, Theoretical Economics, Applied Economics, Sociology, Journalism and Communication, Statistics, Business Administration, Marxist Theory, Chinese Language and Literature), 5 A disciplines (Philosophy, Political Science, Chinese History, Foreign Languages and Literatures, Computer Science and Technology), and 1 A- discipline (Physics). The comprehensive strength in humanities and social sciences is top in the country, strongly attracting high-scoring liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law (A+) had a 2024 popularity assessment of divided and wait-and-see; Finance/Finance and Economics/Economics (Applied Economics A+) also divided and wait-and-see; Journalism and Communication (A+) saw significant discouragement in 2023; the number of History Category candidates in this province was 63,903 in 2021 → 56,324 in 2025 → estimated about 56,400 in 2026 (based on total candidates 200,000 × recent average proportion of History Category about 28.2%), with the candidate scale basically stable; the provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch in 2025 was 437 points, up 37 points from 400 points in 2024, reflecting a slight increase in overall competition; Renmin University of China is located in Beijing, which is a cross-province application for Liaoning candidates; Beijing, as a first-tier city, has a sustained attraction for candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the slow backward trend of historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025, somewhat negative reputation but top university level, and basically stable candidate scale in this province, it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will move back slightly from the 2025 baseline of 98, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 103, and a range of 53–153.
